calendar.matters:
Re-Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Mar-30-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ryan B. Kadevari, of Weinberg, Roger & Rosenfeld, Tel. 510.337.1001, for petitioners;
Rana Gerges, of Green & Hall, LLP, Tel. 916.367.7098, for respondents, appearing via CourtCall.

Ruling: A R G U E D. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES' Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is granted and respondent Valli Construction, Inc.'s request to correct arbitration award is denied. Petitioner is entitled to judgment in its favor in the amount of the arbitration award of $25,073.76 plus reasonably incurred attorney's fees of $3,143.75 plus costs of $1,108.64. Respondent's request to correct the arbitration award is both untimely and lacking in merit. Respondent has not shown that there is an evident miscalculation in the award or that there is any ambiguity in the award requiring further consideration by the arbitrator. The parties agree that International Union of Petroleum and Industrial Workers v. Western Industrial Maintenance, Inc. (9th Cir. 1983) 707 F.2d 425 sets forth the applicable law regarding an award of attorney's fees. Per that case, petitioner is entitled to an award of fees due to the lack of any justification for respondent's failure to abide by the award. Order and judgment signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.

Re-Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Mar-09-2017 Continued To Mar-30-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is continued to March 30, 2017, at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302, per the agreement of the parties. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.
